changes.description: Add a bounded, resumable /loop command using the existing lead, developer and reviewer contracts.
changes.failure_pattern: The harness has maker/checker primitives but no explicit command that gates writes, persists loop state and caps repeated implementation-review cycles.
changes.why_this_component: The missing behavior is composition of existing agents and skills. A command is the smallest owning surface and avoids a one-use agent, skill or runtime engine.

changes.description: Mechanically enforce the loop command's approval, iteration, reviewer, state and worktree invariants.
changes.failure_pattern: A future prompt edit could silently remove the safety gate, bounded iteration policy or maker/checker separation.
changes.why_this_component: The existing harness checker already owns command-contract drift detection, so adding one focused check and three negative tests is the local extension.
